heroStats.label: Dollar purchasing power
heroStats.context: Approximate decline in the CPI purchasing power of one U.S. dollar from January 1971 to March 2026.

heroStats.label: M2 money stock
heroStats.context: Increase in U.S. M2 from January 1971 to March 2026, based on Federal Reserve H.6 data via FRED.

heroStats.label: Artist self-employment
heroStats.context: NEA reported artists were 3.6 times as likely as other workers to be self-employed in 2012-2016.

heroStats.label: Endowment spending
heroStats.context: Average effective spending rate reported in the FY2024 NACUBO-Commonfund Study of Endowments.

charts.title: Purchasing power remaining from a 1971 dollar
charts.description: CPI-based estimate using January observations and March 2026 as the latest available value. The chart shows purchasing power relative to January 1971 = 100.

charts.title: Real value of a fixed $10,000 arts grant
charts.description: If a nominal grant amount stays fixed at $10,000, its CPI-adjusted purchasing power falls as input costs rise.

charts.title: Bitcoin issuance approaches a fixed terminal supply
charts.description: Bitcoin's subsidy schedule approaches, but does not exceed, roughly 21 million bitcoin. This is a monetary-rule chart, not an investment-return chart.

charts.title: Illustrative reserve durability scenario
charts.description: A conventional endowment model with 6.8% nominal return, 4.8% annual spending, and 3.0% inflation loses real principal over time. A BTC reserve line is shown as units held, not projected purchasing power.

sources.label: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics via FRED, Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers: All Items in U.S. City Average (CPIAUCSL)
Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System via FRED, M2 Money Stock (M2SL)

Satoshi Nakamoto, Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System
National Endowment for the Arts, Artists and Other Cultural Workers: A Statistical Portrait
National Endowment for the Arts, Artists and Other Cultural Workers indicator archive
U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics, Occupational Outlook Handbook: Craft and Fine Artists
U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis, Arts and Cultural Production Satellite Account, U.S. and States, 2023
